title: Mohamy Phone 1.3.0
notes:
# Mohamy Phone 1.3.0

Tag: `v1.3.0`

- Update release manifest for v1.3.0
- Fix release workflow gradlew permissions
- Allow release workflow to fall back without signing secrets
- Refine smart assistant layout and bump release 1.3.0
- Add per-account local workspaces on device
- Isolate local data when switching accounts
- Fix APK licensing endpoint and add sell-ready admin presets
- Redesign admin panel UI and improve management workflow
- Production deploy prep: admin domain setup and full maintenance
